title: DefiLlama
subtitle: DeFi TVL, prices & yields across chains
description: Free x402 passthrough for DefiLlama protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin data. Key-free DeFi decision data layer for agents. Data by DefiLlama.
useCase: Use to read protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics for DeFi research, allocation or risk screening.

zh-CN.title: DefiLlama 数据
zh-CN.subtitle: DeFi TVL、价格与收益率聚合数据
zh-CN.description: DefiLlama 数据 API（TRON） 通过 x402 gateway 提供公开数据访问，适合 Agent 在金融分析、交易研究、风险筛查和数据聚合流程中调用。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

endpoints.title: All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
endpoints.subtitle: /protocols
endpoints.description: All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when an agent needs all protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown through the defillama-tvl-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.title: All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
zh-CN.subtitle: /protocols
zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocols`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.title: Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
endpoints.subtitle: /protocol/{slug}
endpoints.description: Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when an agent needs single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata through the defillama-tvl-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.title: Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
zh-CN.subtitle: /protocol/{slug}
zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocol/{slug}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when an agent needs current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated) through the defillama-coins-price-tron gateway route.
